name: ThermoMPNN-D
description: Given a protein structure, predict the stability change from double point mutations. Extends ThermoMPNN to capture epistatic couplings between point mutations.
capabilities: Given a protein structure, predict the stability change from double point mutations
Extends ThermoMPNN to capture epistatic couplings between point mutations

pdbFile.description: Input protein structure in PDB format for double point mutation stability prediction

chains.description: Chain(s) to evaluate double point mutations on

multi.description: Include all chains in structural context for multi-chain complexes
